pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 2.6.3 to 3.3.4 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to ensure compilation against the target JDK.
Rename the Maven artifact ID from 'example' to 'happycows' to reflect the specific project identity.
Update project name and description to accurately describe the application as a simulation game.
pom.xml.human_impl:
<name>happycows</name>
<description>A Simulation Game of the Tragedy of the Commons.</description>

pom.xml.general_idea: Define a Maven property for target classes to be used by testing plugins.
Remove the MongoDB starter dependency, likely switching to a different data persistence strategy or removing it entirely.
Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to maintain compatibility with Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for end-to-end browser testing.
Add WireMock dependency for stubbing HTTP services during testing.
Add Awaitility dependency to simplify asynchronous testing patterns.
Explicitly add Spring Security Config dependency to manage security context in async threads.
Add Apache Commons CSV dependency for handling CSV data processing.
Configure Maven compiler plugin to use full annotation processing.
Configure Surefire plugin to use TCP for event transmission to fix potential test execution issues.
Add Git Commit ID plugin to generate build information properties from Git metadata.
Upgrade JaCoCo plugin to version 0.8.10 for better Java 21 support and features.
Update JaCoCo exclusion patterns to match the new package structure (happiercows).
Add a JaCoCo check execution to enforce strict code coverage rules during the build.
Upgrade Pitest plugin to version 1.17.0 for improved mutation testing capabilities.
Upgrade Pitest JUnit 5 plugin to version 1.2.1 to match the main Pitest version.
Configure Pitest to store mutation history for incremental analysis.
Update Pitest target classes to use the defined Maven property.
Update Pitest excluded classes to match the new package structure and new service implementations.
Exclude web integration tests from Pitest mutation analysis.
Exclude specific methods from Pitest mutation analysis to avoid false positives or performance issues.
Configure Pitest to avoid mutating calls to specific logging and security classes.
Add a Maven profile for running with WireMock, activating H2 database and specific Spring profiles.
Add a Maven profile for integration testing, including frontend build steps and H2 database.
Update the Node.js version used by the frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for modern frontend tooling support.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add an alternative directory name for Storybook static output to .gitignore to prevent accidental commits.
Add macOS .DS_Store files to .gitignore to prevent cluttering the repository with local metadata.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace Debian-based apt-get package installation with Alpine's apk package manager due to the base image change.
Install Maven explicitly via apk since the new base image does not include it.
Install Node.js using nvm to ensure a specific version compatible with the build process.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or build tools.
Install git to support build-time configuration that relies on git metadata.
Update the build command to use Maven's batch mode and skip tests during the Docker image build phase.
Change the container entrypoint from a generic bash shell to directly executing the Java application jar.
Set the PRODUCTION environment variable to true to configure the application for production mode.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project from the generic demo name to the specific application name HappyCows/HappierCows.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title from '# demo-spring-react-example-v2: dsre-v2' to '# HappyCows/HappierCows'

README.md.general_idea: Replace old Storybook and Heroku deployment links with new Dokku deployment links for production and QA environments.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced Storybook links with tables containing 'happycows.dokku-00.cs.ucsb.edu' links

README.md.general_idea: Add a detailed description of the application's purpose, sponsor, and educational context.
README.md.human_impl: Added section describing HappyCows as a simulation game for Tragedy of the Commons sponsored by Prof. de Vries

README.md.general_idea: Update the technology stack description to reflect the current Spring Boot and React setup with Google OAuth.
README.md.human_impl: Added bullet points listing Spring Boot, React, and Spring Security plus Google OAuth

README.md.general_idea: Add references to new documentation files for game play rules and environment variables.
Update error messages and instructions to reference Dokku instead of Heroku.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'On Heroku' to 'On Dokku' in the frontend connection error message

README.md.general_idea: Remove documentation sections specific to Heroku deployment and database access.
README.md.human_impl: Removed 'Getting Started on Heroku' and 'Accessing Database Console' sections

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions for running integration and end-to-end tests using Maven.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'To Run Integration and End-to-end Tests' with mvn failsafe commands

README.md.general_idea: Add instructions for running partial and full mutation testing using Pitest.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'Partial pitest runs' with mvn pitest:mutationCoverage commands

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for React Toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook previews.
Add imports for MSW Storybook addon to enable API mocking in stories.
Initialize Mock Service Worker with dynamic URL configuration for local and remote environments.
Add MSW decorator globally to all stories to enable mocking capabilities.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: mswDecorator, // provide the MSW decorator globally

frontend/docs-index/_config.yml.general_idea: Simplify the Jekyll site title from a QA-specific label to a generic documentation title.
frontend/docs-index/_config.yml.human_impl: title: QA Site for Documentation -> title: Documentation

frontend/docs-index/_config.yml.general_idea: Remove a duplicate definition of repo_name that appeared in the middle of the configuration file.
Update the remaining repo_name placeholder value to indicate it is to be determined.

frontend/docs-index/_layouts/default.htm.general_idea: Change the HTML title tag to display the repository name instead of the page-specific title.
Remove the external stylesheet link from the document head.
Modify the main heading to explicitly state 'Documentation for' followed by the repository name.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Replace simple list-based documentation index with structured HTML tables for better readability and organization.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Replaced bullet points with <table> structures for Documentation, Test Coverage, and Open Pull Requests sections.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Add inline CSS styles to format the new table-based documentation index.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Added <style> block with border, padding, and zebra-stripe rules for tables.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Update repository links to point to GitHub Actions instead of a separate docs repo.
Add dynamic tables to display Javadoc, Storybook, and test coverage reports for open pull requests.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Added Jinja2 loops {% for pr in site.pull_requests %} to generate rows for PR-specific reports.

frontend/docs-index/index.md.general_idea: Add a notes section explaining potential issues with PR report links and incremental pitest results.
frontend/docs-index/index.md.human_impl: Added '## Notes' section with bullet points explaining link validity and pitest behavior.
